Who I Am

GeoEngineer &
Tech Creator

I'm Dennis Mutunga — a 3rd-year Geomatic Engineering student at JKUAT, Juja, Kenya, passionate about bridging geospatial technology with modern software development.

From mapping terrain with total stations to building full-stack web apps and browser games, I combine engineering precision with creative coding. I run Surveyers — a GIS & surveying services business based in Juja.

What I Offer

Services & Expertise

GIS & Mapping
Professional GIS analysis, thematic mapping, QGIS projects, and spatial data management for land, environment, and infrastructure.
Surveying Services
Land surveying, boundary determination, topographic surveys, and setting-out using total station, GNSS & EDM equipment.
Web Development
Custom single-page apps, dashboards, portfolio sites, and geospatial web tools built in HTML/CSS/JS — no frameworks needed.
Game Development
Browser-based board games and interactive apps. Creator of the African Stone Pit – Chain Capture Mancala game with AI & P2P modes.
Remote Sensing
Satellite imagery analysis, photogrammetric processing, and drone data interpretation for environmental and land use studies.
IoT & Smart Dashboards
Real-time IoT dashboards, smart campus systems, and sensor data visualisation. Built SmartBin AI for JKUAT campus waste management.
Portfolio

Recent Projects

01
African Stone Pit – Chain Capture
4×4 Mancala-style browser board game with chain-capture mechanics, 3 game modes (local 2P, AI Easy/Med/Hard, online P2P via PeerJS), Web Audio API ambient music.
HTML/JSPeerJSWeb AudioAI
02
JKUAT SmartBin AI Dashboard
Real-time waste management IoT dashboard with SVG campus map, bin fill-level markers, GPS truck tracking. Built for SES World Engineering Day 2026.
FlaskGoogle MapsIoTSVG
03
MTG7 GeoEngineer Secure Vault
Password-protected cloud file vault deployed to Netlify with Cloudinary storage, file viewer, AI assistant panel, drag-and-drop uploads and dark/light mode.
NetlifyCloudinaryJavaScript
04
POLYMORPH File Converter
Universal browser file converter supporting 14 format categories, bidirectional conversions, in-browser handlers. Single HTML file, zero install.
HTMLCSSJavaScript
05
Meru County Thematic Maps
7 QGIS-style cartographic map types (choropleth, dot, proportional symbols) using synthetic geometries and 2009 census data. Print-quality PDFs.
QGISPythonCartography
06
Surveyers Business Website
Single-page site for GIS/surveying services business in Juja. Dark charcoal/gold scheme, WhatsApp integration, admin upload panel, downloads page.
HTML/CSSWhatsApp APIBusiness
